mapper.insert: insert into individual_activity ( user_id, activity_id, position, status ) values ( #{studentId}, #{activityId}, #{position}, #{status} )
mapper.select:
select
from individual_activity ia where ia.activity_id = #{activityId} and ia.status = 1

select
from individual_activity ia where ia.activity_id = #{activityId} and ia.status = 0
select a.id, a.name, count(ia.user_id) as memberNum from activity a left join individual_activity ia on a.id = ia.activity_id group by a.id, a.name order by memberNum desc limit 5
